posts.author: THancock (Tim Hancock)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Basic search functionality: Exact match word or phrase searching.

What are you trying to achieve

We have IDs in columns that are numeric. If I search for “111”, I don’t want to see results for “1111”.

Search is of vital importance to a productive workflow, and imprecise results lead to confusion and a lack of trust.
